question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Refunds are processed within 3–5 business days for cards. Bank transfers may take up to 10 business days.

question: I was charged twice. What should I do?
answer: Contact support with your order number and both transaction IDs. We will verify and refund the duplicate within 2 business days.

question: Why was I charged after cancelling?
answer: Cancellations within 1 hour are voided. If charged, it's a temporary authorisation that drops off within 3–5 days.

question: My promo code didn't apply. Can I still get it?
answer: Contact support within 24 hours with your order number and code. We will apply as a partial refund.

question: How do I get an invoice?
answer: Go to My Orders → select order → Download Invoice. Invoices are also emailed at purchase.

question: Can I get price adjustment if price drops?
answer: We offer price adjustment within 48 hours if the same item drops in price. Contact support with order number.

question: Why is my refund only partial?
answer: Partial refunds occur when items lack original packaging or are damaged. Check return confirmation for breakdown.

question: Invoice shows different amount than I paid.
answer: Invoices reflect final settled amount. Discrepancies can be from tax adjustments or conversion. Contact support.

question: How do I cancel a subscription?
answer: Go to Account → Subscriptions → select → Cancel. Takes effect at end of current cycle.

question: Gift card wasn't deducted at checkout.
answer: Codes are case-sensitive with no spaces. If correct but not working, contact support with card number.

question: Are there hidden fees?
answer: We only charge product price, taxes, and selected shipping. No hidden fees. All shown before payment confirmation.

question: How do I dispute an unrecognised charge?
answer: Check if a family member ordered. If not, contact support immediately with transaction date and amount.

question: Can I change payment method after ordering?
answer: Payment methods cannot be changed once confirmed. Cancel and re-order with correct method.

question: What happens to refund if I paid with gift card?
answer: Refunds return to original gift card. If card fully redeemed and partially paid by card, card portion refunds to card.

question: Why am I charged a maintenance fee?
answer: We don't charge maintenance fees. If you see one, contact support immediately — may indicate billing error.

question: How do I get VAT invoice for business?
answer: Go to My Orders → select order → Download VAT Invoice. If account not set up, contact support with VAT number.

question: Refund issued but not in my bank.
answer: Refunds take 3–10 business days depending on bank. If over 10 days, contact support with confirmation number.

question: Can I get instalment payment?
answer: We partner with Klarna and Afterpay for orders over $50. Select 'Pay in instalments' at checkout.

question: How do I remove saved credit card?
answer: Go to Account → Payment Methods → select card → Remove. If linked to subscription, update subscription first.

question: Will I be charged during free trial?
answer: No charge during trial. Email notification 3 days before trial ends. Cancel anytime before to avoid charge.

question: What if my order total doesn't match at checkout?
answer: Verify all items, quantities, shipping, and taxes. Contact support before completing if total seems wrong.

question: Can I split payment across multiple cards?
answer: We currently don't support split payments. Use gift cards to offset, then pay remainder with one card.

question: How do subscription renewals work?
answer: Auto-renew at end of cycle. Email reminder 7 days before. Update or cancel anytime in Account → Subscriptions.

question: Why was I charged shipping on free shipping order?
answer: Free shipping has minimum order value or item restrictions. Check promotion terms or contact support.

question: Can I get a receipt for tax purposes?
answer: Invoices serve as receipts for tax. Download from My Orders or contact support for specific tax documentation.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Go to My Orders → select order → Track Package. Real-time carrier updates and estimated delivery shown.

question: My order is late. What to do?
answer: Check tracking first. If no update for 3+ business days, contact support with order number.

question: Package says delivered but I didn't get it.
answer: Check with neighbours and safe locations. If not found, contact support within 7 days to file claim.

question: Can I change delivery address after ordering?
answer: Only if carrier hasn't picked up yet. Contact support immediately with order number to request.

question: How do I return an item?
answer: Go to My Orders → select order → Start Return. Print prepaid label and drop at carrier location.

question: Order arrived damaged. What now?
answer: Don't discard packaging. Take photos and contact support within 48 hours for replacement or refund.

question: How long does standard shipping take?
answer: 3–7 business days within continental US. Express (1–2 days) available at checkout for fee.

question: Can I pick up in-store?
answer: Click-and-collect available at selected locations. Choose 'Pick up in store' at checkout.

question: I got wrong item. How to get correct one?
answer: Contact support with order number and photo of item. We'll ship correct item with expedited delivery free.

question: Does my package need signature?
answer: Orders over $200 require signature. If unavailable, carrier leaves collection notice for re-delivery or pickup.

question: Can I reschedule delivery?
answer: Rescheduling managed with carrier. Use tracking link in shipping email to access carrier rescheduling.

question: How to return large/heavy item?
answer: Contact support to arrange courier collection at your convenience at no extra charge.

question: What if I'm not home when order arrives?
answer: Carrier leaves package in safe location if possible, or collection notice. Redirect to pickup via tracking link.

question: How to track international order?
answer: International tracking on Track Package page. Customs processing can add 3–10 business days.

question: Tracking hasn't updated in 5 days. Is package lost?
answer: Gaps occur at sorting facilities. If no update after 7 business days, contact support for carrier investigation.

question: Can I choose specific delivery date?
answer: Scheduled delivery available on select items. If offered, calendar shown at checkout to choose date.

question: Do you ship to PO boxes?
answer: Yes, via USPS. Express services like FedEx and UPS don't deliver to PO boxes.

question: How do I cancel return I initiated?
answer: Go to My Orders → Returns → select return → Cancel Return. If shipped back, contact support.

question: What's delivery policy for fragile items?
answer: Fragile items packed with reinforced materials and marked. If damaged, contact support within 24 hours with photos.

question: Is same-day delivery available?
answer: Available in select cities on eligible items. If available, 'Same-Day Delivery' shown at checkout before 12 PM local.

question: Can I combine multiple orders into one shipment?
answer: Orders ship as soon as ready. We can't combine after placement. To ship together, place as single order.

question: What happens if delivery fails multiple times?
answer: After 3 failed attempts, package returns to warehouse. We'll contact you to arrange re-delivery or refund.

question: How do I report a missing package?
answer: Contact support with order and tracking numbers. We file claim with carrier and resend or refund.

question: Can I redirect package in transit?
answer: Use tracking link to access carrier's redirect options (hold at location, neighbor delivery, etc).

question: What if only part of my order arrives?
answer: Some items may ship separately. Check tracking for all packages. If item truly missing, contact support.

question: Why can't I add items to cart?
answer: Clear browser cache and cookies, reload page. If using app, force-close and reopen. Try different browser/device.

question: Website errors when checking out.
answer: 504 error means temporary server overload. Wait 5 minutes and retry. If persists 30+ minutes, contact support.

question: Product images not loading.
answer: Often caused by slow connection or ad-blockers. Try disabling extensions and refreshing. Clear cache helps.

question: App crashes when trying to pay.
answer: Update app to latest version. If updated, uninstall and reinstall. Ensure OS is up to date.

question: Search not returning results for existing products.
answer: Search indexes refresh every few hours. Newly added items may not appear yet. Try browsing category directly.

question: Order history blank after app update.
answer: Can happen after major update. Log out completely and log back in. If still missing after 30 min, contact support.

question: Discount disappeared between cart and checkout.
answer: Codes validated at final step. Some have quantity/product restrictions. Check code terms or contact support.

question: Checkout form says address invalid.
answer: Use standard format, avoid abbreviations in street name. Use 'Apt/Unit' field for unit numbers.

question: Website logs me out every few minutes.
answer: Can be caused by cookie restrictions. Ensure cookies enabled for our site and not in private/incognito mode.

question: Website very slow today. Is there outage?
answer: Check status.ourstore.com for real-time platform updates. If no outage listed and continues, contact support.

question: Wishlist empty after logging back in.
answer: Wishlists tied to logged-in account. Ensure correct account. If items missing from correct account, contact support.

question: Promo code field not visible on mobile.
answer: Scroll down on checkout — field is below item summary on smaller screens. If absent, update app to latest.

question: Not receiving order confirmation emails.
answer: Check spam/junk folder. Add our domain to whitelist. Verify account email address is correct.

question: Payment asking for code I never receive.
answer: Codes sent by bank for 3D Secure. Contact your bank if not receiving. This is bank-level security.

question: App shows different price than website.
answer: Prices should match. If different, clear app cache. If discrepancy remains, contact support with screenshots.

question: Can I use website on mobile browser?
answer: Yes, fully optimized for mobile browsers. Use Safari, Chrome, or Firefox for best experience.

question: Why does page reload when I click anything?
answer: Usually caused by JavaScript errors or extensions. Try different browser or disable extensions temporarily.

question: Images show broken icon after site update.
answer: Hard refresh page (Ctrl+F5 or Cmd+Shift+R). If persists, clear browser cache completely.

question: Can I save items without creating account?
answer: Guest checkout available but wishlist and saved items require account to persist across sessions.

question: App asks for permissions I don't understand.
answer: Camera: scan barcodes. Location: find nearby stores. Notifications: order updates. All optional.

question: Website certificate error in browser.
answer: Ensure date/time correct on device. If correct, may be ISP issue. Try different network or contact support.

question: Can I use multiple devices with same account?
answer: Yes, log in on unlimited devices. Data syncs across all. Log out on public/shared devices for security.

question: Page stuck loading indefinitely.
answer: Check internet connection. Try different browser. Clear cache. If persists, may be regional connectivity issue.

question: Checkout button greyed out and won't click.
answer: Ensure all required fields completed. Check email format, card expiry valid, and address fields filled.

question: Can't upload photo in product review.
answer: Max file size 5MB. Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, GIF. Reduce size or try different image.

question: Forgot password. How to reset?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on login, enter email. Reset link emailed to you. Link expires in 24 hours.

question: Account suspended. What to do?
answer: Suspensions due to suspected fraud or policy violations. Contact support with account email for review within 24 hours.

question: How to change account email?
answer: Go to Account → Settings → Email → Update. Confirmation email to new address must be clicked to complete.

question: Locked out by two-factor auth.
answer: Contact support with account email and ID verification (e.g., last order details). We can disable 2FA after verifying.

question: Loyalty points disappeared. How to recover?
answer: Contact support with account email. We review points transaction history and restore incorrectly removed points.

question: How to delete account?
answer: Go to Account → Settings → Delete Account. Removes all order history and points permanently. Irreversible.

question: Can I save multiple addresses?
answer: Yes. Go to Account → Addresses → Add New. Save up to 5 addresses and set one as default.

question: How to update phone number?
answer: Go to Account → Settings → Contact Info → Edit Phone. Verification code sent to new number to confirm.

question: Can't see invoices in account.
answer: Invoices generated 24 hours after order confirmed. If older invoices missing, try different browser or clear cache.

question: How to opt out of marketing emails?
answer: Click 'Unsubscribe' at bottom of marketing email, or Account → Notification Preferences → uncheck 'Promotional'.

question: Account hacked. What to do?
answer: Change password immediately and enable 2FA. Contact support right away to review recent activity and secure account.

question: Can I merge two accounts?
answer: We can merge accounts with same name and verified identity. Contact support with both emails to process.

question: How to manage notification preferences?
answer: Go to Account → Notification Preferences. Toggle email, push, SMS for orders, promotions, account alerts individually.

question: Name spelled wrong on account.
answer: Go to Account → Personal Info → Edit Name. If locked, contact support with proof of ID to update manually.

question: Can I add family member to account?
answer: Individual accounts only. Family members create own accounts. Share loyalty points balance using points transfer feature.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Account → Security → Two-Factor Auth → Enable. Scan QR with authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy).

question: Can I see login history for security?
answer: Go to Account → Security → Login Activity. Shows recent logins with device, location, time.

question: How to update password?
answer: Go to Account → Security → Change Password. Enter current password, then new password twice.

question: Account showing wrong country/currency.
answer: Set at account creation. Contact support to change — requires re-entering payment details due to currency conversion.

question: Can I have business and personal account with same email?
answer: One account per email. Use different email for business account or add +business to your email (e.g., you+business@email.com).

question: How to close account but keep order history?
answer: Order history exported before deletion. Go to Account → Delete → Export Data first, then proceed with deletion.

question: Why does account ask for ID verification?
answer: For high-value orders, address changes, or unusual activity to protect against fraud. Upload government ID or contact support.

question: Can I transfer my account to someone else?
answer: Accounts are non-transferable. New user must create their own account.

question: How to update marketing preferences?
answer: Account → Notifications → Marketing. Choose email, SMS, push preferences. Can opt out of all or select specific categories.

question: Account locked after multiple login attempts.
answer: Security feature after 5 failed logins. Wait 30 minutes or use password reset to unlock immediately.
